title: The Exchange Sacrifice
summary: Give up a rook for a minor piece

steps.title: Giving Up the Rook
steps.text: An exchange sacrifice (rook for minor piece) is one of the most advanced concepts. Petrosian was its virtuoso — sacrificing "the exchange" (rook for bishop/knight) for long-term positional advantages.

steps.title: When It Works
steps.text: Good exchange sacrifices require: (1) the resulting structure favors you long-term, (2) your minor piece is strong (outpost, bishop pair), (3) your opponent's remaining rook has no good file. Petrosian's Rxc3 is the classical example.
